evals.prompt: What properties does the Table component have?
evals.expected_output: List the Table, PrimaryTable, EnhancedTable constants and TableProps, TableCol types
assertions: Includes PrimaryTable (index.ts:20, withInstall(_PrimaryTable)) and EnhancedTable (index.ts:21, withInstall(_EnhancedTable))
Includes TableProps (types.ts:36, type alias pointing to PrimaryTableProps<T>) and TableCol (types.ts:37, type alias pointing to PrimaryTableCol<T>)

evals.expected_output: packages/shared/hooks/useDefaultValue/index.ts, signature includes value, defaultValue, onChange, propsName
assertions: Points to definition at packages/shared/hooks/useDefaultValue/index.ts:L5-37
Includes params value:Ref<T>, defaultValue:T, onChange:ChangeHandler<T,P>, propsName:string (L6-9)
Return type [Ref<T>, ChangeHandler<T, P>]

evals.prompt: What does the Table component depend on?
evals.expected_output: 11 callers: useRowSelect, useFilter, useSorter, useColumnController, etc.
assertions: Includes useRowSelect (useRowSelect.tsx:L7 import, L34 calls useDefaultValue(selectedRowKeys, props.defaultSelectedRowKeys||[], props.onSelectChange, 'selectedRowKeys'))
Includes useFilter (useFilter.tsx:L5 import, uses useDefaultValue for filterValue inside the function)
Includes useSorter (useSorter.tsx:L5 import, L12 useDefaultValue(sort, props.defaultSort, props.onSortChange, 'sort'), L13 useDefaultValue(data, [], props.onDataChange, 'data'))

Includes useColumnController (useColumnController.tsx:L11 import), useTreeDataExpand (useTreeDataExpand.ts:L3 import), useRowHighlight (useRowHighlight.ts:L3 import), useRowExpand (useRowExpand.tsx:L15 import), useTreeSelect (useTreeSelect.tsx:L6 import, L107 call), useMultiple (useMultiple.tsx:L7 import, L29 call), useSingle (useSingle.tsx via useSingleValue indirect call), at least 8 listed

evals.expected_output: useRowSelect directly calls useDefaultValue, no intermediate functions
assertions: useRowSelect directly calls useDefaultValue (useRowSelect.tsx:L7 import, L34 [tSelectedRowKeys, setTSelectedRowKeys] = useDefaultValue(selectedRowKeys, ..., 'selectedRowKeys'))
Call path is direct, no intermediate functions

evals.expected_output: useUpload, useInput, useTagList, useInputNumber, useSingleValue, useRangeValue, useTreeState
assertions: Includes useUpload (useUpload.ts:L13 import, L26 [uploadValue, setUploadValue] = useVModel(files, modelValue, defaultFiles.value, props.onChange, 'files')) → upload module
Includes useInput (useInput.ts:L4 import, L29 [innerValue, setInnerValue] = useVModel(value, modelValue, props.defaultValue, props.onChange)) → input module
Includes useTagList (useTagList.tsx:L7 import, L23 [_tagValue, setTagValue] = useVModel(value, modelValue, props.defaultValue||[], props.onChange)) → tag-input module

Includes useInputNumber (useInputNumber.tsx:L2 import, L28 [tValue, setTValue] = useVModel(value, modelValue, props.defaultValue, props.onChange)) → input-number module, useSingleValue (useSingleValue.tsx:L10 import, L15 [value, onChange] = useVModel(valueFromProps, modelValue, props.defaultValue, props.onChange)) → date-picker module, useRangeValue (useRangeValue.ts:L2 import, L18 [value, onChange] = useVModel(valueFromProps, modelValue, props.defaultValue, props.onChange)) → date-picker module, useTreeState (useTreeState.ts:L1 import, L12 vmValue = useVModel(props, refProps, 'value', 'defaultValue', 'onChange', 'change')) → tree module, at least 6 listed

evals.prompt: How many components use the popup component?
assertions: Mentions ~12 components depend on popup (e.g. tooltip, dropdown, popconfirm, select-input, menu/submenu, guide, auto-complete, anchor, range-input, sticky-tool, table/filter, color-picker)
Mentions import { Popup } or import Popup from '../popup' style references

Lists all component files that use popup: tooltip.tsx, dropdown.tsx, popconfirm.tsx, select-input.tsx, submenu.tsx, guide.tsx, auto-complete.tsx, anchor-target.tsx, range-input-popup.tsx, sticky-item.tsx, filter-controller.tsx, color-picker.tsx

evals.prompt: What components would be affected if useVModel's input params are changed?
evals.expected_output: Affects upload, tag-input, date-picker, input, input-number, tree and other components
assertions: Lists at least 6 affected hooks: useUpload(L21, upload module), useInput(L20, input module), useTagList(L18, tag-input module), useInputNumber(L24, input-number module), useSingleValue(L13, date-picker module), useRangeValue(L15, date-picker module), useTreeState(L5, tree module)
Mentions involved component modules: upload, input, tag-input, input-number, date-picker, tree
Provides impact scope assessment: 7 hooks, 6 component modules, 8 direct callers, medium-to-high impact

evals.prompt: How many definitions does useDragSort have, and how do their signatures differ?
assertions: Mentions shared/hooks/useDragSort/index.ts:L21, function useDragSort(props: any), used for tabs drag sort
Mentions table/hooks/useDragSort.ts:L24-30, function useDragSort(props: TdPrimaryTableProps, context: SetupContext, params: ComputedRef<{showElement:boolean}>), used for table row/column drag sort

Mentions transfer/hooks/useDragSort.ts:L4-8, function useDragSort(currentValue: Ref<Array<TransferValue>>, curPageData: ComputedRef<TransferItemOption[]>, handleDataChange: (data, movedValue) => void), used for transfer drag sort
Compares signature differences: shared version accepts only props:any, table version accepts TdPrimaryTableProps+context+params, transfer version accepts currentValue+curPageData+handleDataChange

evals.prompt: What are the differences between useVirtualScroll and useVirtualScrollNew?
evals.expected_output: Both are under shared/hooks; old version params data/container/config options, new version params container Ref + UseVirtualScrollParams
assertions: Mentions useVirtualScroll at packages/shared/hooks/useVirtualScroll/index.ts:L11, signature useVirtualScroll({data, container, fixedHeight=false, lineHeight=30, bufferSize=20, threshold=100})
Mentions useVirtualScrollNew at packages/shared/hooks/useVirtualScrollNew/index.ts:L34, signature useVirtualScrollNew(container: Ref<HTMLElement|null>, params: UseVirtualScrollParams)

Compares param differences: old version destructured params {data,container,fixedHeight,lineHeight,bufferSize,threshold}, new version receives container Ref + UseVirtualScrollParams(L14-22, contains data/scroll/fixedRows/preventResizeRefresh)
Mentions UseVirtualScrollParams and VirtualScrollConfig TS types
